macro.title: ‘Lock it in!’: Mortgage rates climb to 6.5% amid global volatility
macro.what: Mortgage rates have returned to the 6.5% level as financial markets shift their focus from economic data to escalating geopolitical events.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.
